name: Pumpkin Gingerbread Loaves
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Grated fresh gingerroot OR 1 teaspoon Ground ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease four 4 x 9-inch loaf pans with butter or cooking spray, greasing only halfway up the sides.
2. In a large bowl, stir together 1 cup of flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and baking soda.
3. Add pumpkin, molasses, eggs, margarine or butter, and ginger to the dry ingredients. Beat until combined.
4. Add remaining flour; beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for about 2 minutes, scraping sides of bowl occasionally.
5. Divide batter evenly among prepared pans.
6. Stir together walnuts and sugar; sprinkle over batter in each pan.
7. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Cool loaves in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and cool thoroughly on racks.
Makes 4 loaves, 8 servings.
